node.text: A Boy with OCD Shoots Himself but…
Bhai exact kha kr ky goli marni h mjy b bta do 😂
Me home se bahir ye krke ata hu
Iska wasey kia ilaj hey mujey bhi hey😢
Bhai to Kia promote kr ra
Ok we will not shoot our self as you said don't try this at home
It's time to shoot myself Aar ya paar
I am a big fan broo❤️
Bhi ma to khwab ma bhi na kron tum ghar ki batkr rhaho😢
Isk mtlb hm b goli khyn to agy bhry gy 😂 wtf
Lobotomy in the past ancient psychotic treatment
Bhai ap b tu muneeb ko pani or tablet laa k dy sakty thy..?😐
